sections.title: If the player has recently stolen from their stall

lines.speaker: Fur Merchant
lines.text: You're the one who stole from me! Guards! Guards!

lines.speaker: Fur Merchant
lines.text: Hello there. Want to trade some furs?

lines.speaker: Fur Merchant
lines.text: I have a selection of both rare and common furs from all across the kingdom. Also, if you happen to have any furs you've brought from the east, I'd be pretty keen to buy some.

lines.speaker: Fur Merchant
lines.text: Tetamo! If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
